invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.132（基于ATR 0.0013和近期低点）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 0.132 (based on ATR 0.0013 and recent lows) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating long pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破880（基于ATR 3.8686和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 880 (based on ATR 3.8686 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破135（基于ATR 1.2506和近期支撑）或融资费率Z-Score升至-50%以上（显示空头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks below 135 (based on ATR 1.2506 and recent support) or funding rate Z-Score rises above -50% (indicating short pressure easing).

invalidation.zh: 如果价格突破0.142（基于ATR 0.0013和近期高点）或融资费率Z-Score降至50%以下（显示多头压力缓解），则失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidated if price breaks above 0.142 (based on ATR 0.0013 and recent highs) or funding rate Z-Score falls below 50% (indicating long pressure easing).
